Dialog.name: DIC_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A group that was established to fight against Shadows. On the outside, it looks like a regular school club. The letters "S.E.E.S." on the armband stand for {f 0 1 2}S{f 0 1 27}pecialized {f 0 1 2}E{f 0 1 27}xtracurricular {f 0 1 2}E{f 0 1 27}xecution {f 0 1 2}S{f 0 1 27}quad.[n]{f 1 1}
